description_long: This object is a high-performance vehicle wheel featuring a wide, slick black tire with no visible tread pattern, indicating it is designed for racing or track use. The tire is mounted on a metallic rim with a striking bronze finish and a five-spoke design, each spoke being thick and slightly concave for added strength and style. The rim's center hub is detailed with visible lug nut holes and a central cap, while the outer edge of the rim is deep, giving the wheel a pronounced lip. The sidewalls of the tire display subtle branding or labeling, adding to its realistic appearance. The rear view reveals the inner structure of the rim, with a large central opening and a metallic backing plate, typical of performance wheels. Overall, the wheel combines robust construction with a visually appealing, sporty design suitable for high-speed urban vehicles.
description: A wide, slick black tire mounted on a bronze five-spoke metallic rim with a deep lip and visible branding, designed for high-performance vehicles.
description_view_0: Side view showing the smooth, treadless black tire with subtle branding on the sidewall.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the bronze five-spoke rim, central hub, and deep lip, with lug nut holes visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view of the tire, similar to view 0, showing the smooth, treadless surface and branding.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the inner structure of the rim, large central opening, and metallic backing plate.
attribute_spoke_pattern: Five thick, evenly spaced spokes in a radial arrangement with a slight concave profile.
attribute_rim_design: Deep-lip rim with a smooth, rounded profile and a metallic bronze finish; no visible beadlock or multi-piece construction.
attribute_lug_nut_configuration: Five lug nut holes arranged in a circular, evenly spaced pattern around the central hub.
attribute_tire_tread_pattern: Completely slick, with no grooves, blocks, or sipes; designed for maximum contact on smooth surfaces.
